note: v2.10.0 adds Chapter 19 covering v2.1.117-v2.1.118 changes. L87 (v2.1.117): new /fork slash command spawns a background subagent that inherits full conversation context — three-layer gating (iv()/sJ9() slash-enable → S8() interactive check → hH(CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT) env → S_(tengu_copper_fox) GB flag), new implicit 'fork' subagent type with tools:['*'] maxTurns:200 model:'inherit' permissionMode:'bubble' — not user-selectable via subagent_type, triggered by omitting it. Skills' context:'fork' frontmatter field (already accepted in v2.1.116) now dispatches to real V75 fork-execution helper instead of inline H$7. New CLAUDE_BRIDGE_REATTACH_SESSION/SEQ env vars for bridge reattach (consumed exactly once, dropped from child env in preSpawn). New 'f' keybinding chord. Plus CLAUDE_CODE_RATE_LIMIT_TIER/CLAUDE_CODE_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE env vars overriding OAuth token fields (client-side test hooks, not security boundary). /schedule gains one-time scheduling with 'triggers'→'routines' terminology shift. /autocompact and /stop-hook both removed outright (not just disabled). L88 (v2.1.118): /cost and /stats folded into /usage as aliases — /usage now has TWO registrations (interactive with thinClientDispatch+requires:ink, non-interactive with supportsNonInteractive+isEnabled:S8()). /autofix-pr description drops 'remote session' framing (continues L85 Remote Workflow sunset). New dark-launched /pro-trial-expired (isEnabled:()=>false). New cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 API beta for prompt cache diagnostics with graceful server-reject degradation. New frontmatter shadow validator with full schema deep-dive: pjH(kind, frontmatter) calls qT1[kind]().strict().safeParse; dispatch table is {skill:eO1, agent:HT1, 'output-style':_T1} — 3 entries, no 'command' (custom commands validated as 'skill'). CRITICAL correction: there is NO formal primary schema — primary frontmatter handling is imperative (Cz8 reads properties directly with JS coercion), so the Zod schemas added in v2.1.118 are the ONLY formal validation. Per-session Gj9 Set dedups telemetry — each unique (event,surface,detail) tuple fires once, not N times per bad skill. Full schema tables extracted: tO1 (11 command keys, all optional scalar/string-array), eO1=tO1.extend (25 skill keys; 'context' is only typed enum inline|fork), HT1 (16 agent keys, name+description REQUIRED; uses camelCase), _T1 (4 output-style keys). Notable drift: progressMessage (documented in L11 as object-level, not YAML) absent from eO1, so aspirational YAML usage fires unknown_key telemetry. New WIF user-OAuth advisory file-locking (4 telemetry events + oauth_401_recovered_from_disk) prevents refresh-token races between multiple Claude Code processes sharing credentials. Removed env vars CLAUDE_CODE_AGENT_NAME/TEAM_NAME (derived from session state now). v2.9.2 baseline: restructured Sources tables in L43 (two distinct zod unions plugin-sources vs marketplace-sources, 11 source literals verified). v2.9.1: extended diff-versions.sh to extract tengu_* identifiers. v2.9.0: rewrote L11 Skills System against v2.1.116 bundle.
